calendar.matters:
MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Disclosure Of The Money Of Account, Medium Exchange And The Attorney Licenses Of All Of The Attorneys Who Worked On This Case And A Billing Breakdown
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Susan Bostwick, Esq. 707-815-5926 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Cara Porter, Deputy Attorney General, 415-510-3508 of the Office of the Attorney General for Defendant.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SUSAN BOSTWICK's Motion To Compel Disclosure Of The Money Of Account, Medium Exchange And The Attorney Licenses Of All Of The Attorneys Who Worked On This Case And A Billing Breakdown.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Judgment was entered in this case on July 17, 2019. There has been no petition for attorneys' fees nor memorandum of costs filed by the prevailing party. Accordingly, there is no basis for this motion and it is DENIED.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar May-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
